creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
> ERROR: PVR - Add-on 'Tvheadend HTSP Client' is using an incompatible API
> version. XBMC minimum API version = '1.9.2', add-on API version '1.9.0'

This maybe due to XBMC_PVR_MIN_API_VERSION not being in sync. It appears the port doesn't use the headers installed by kodi. I've filed bug 198376 for update.
